page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tox21BodyMap provides a visualization of mapping 971 Tox21 ToxCast assay targets to regions of the human body, and allows users to identify target tissues where a specific chemical is more likely to produce effects.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tox21BodyMap provides a visualization of mapping 971 Tox21 ToxCast assay targets to regions of the human body, and allows users to identify target tissues where a specific chemical is more likely to produce effects.
